name: Newsie

abilities.name: Demise (Unfair Bargain)
abilities.text: After this model is killed by an enemy model, the opponent must discard a card, then this model draws two cards.

abilities.name: "Read All About It!"
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 8" gains an Entranced token, one model with this ability may discard a card to draw a card.

actions.name: Thrown Newspaper
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, draw a card.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Innocent Face
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

actions.name: Taken to the Grave
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains marker. Place this model in base contact with the target and remove the target. Then, increase this crew's scandal bar by 2.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
